title: Distribute Elements Into Two Arrays Ii
description: Distribute nums from left to right into two arrays by greater-element counts, then smaller length, then first array; return their concatenation. Inputs use Python lists and integers; unless explicitly stated, callers need not preserve mutable inputs.
input_contract: Parameters in order: nums: list[int]. 3 <= len(nums) <=100000; positive values <=1e9; equal values are not greater; preserve element multiplicity.
output_contract: Return integer[] using exact comparison. Python integer arithmetic has no 32-bit overflow; array/query order is significant.
